item.title: Site Sources
item.dc:creator: Fennel
item.description:
Works Cited

Pictures

  1. “brick, wall, textura” by bartoszjanusz is marked with CC0 1.0. To view the terms, visit https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/?ref=openverse.

  2. No machine-readable author provided. Inge Habex assumed (based on copyright claims)., CC BY-SA 3.0 http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/, via Wikimedia Commons

  3. Joanna Servaes, CC BY-SA 3.0 http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/, via Wikimedia Commons

  4. Editor012456, CC BY-SA 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0, via Wikimedia Commons

  5. Dunpharlain, CC BY-SA 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0, via Wikimedia Commons

  6. Tzirtzi, CC BY-SA 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0, via Wikimedia Commons

Works Cited (pseudo MLA format)

  1. “Guide.” Quarto, Posit, https://quarto.org/docs/guide/. Accessed 22 Jul. 2026.

item.title: Crisis
item.dc:creator: Fennel
item.description:
I can’t breathe.

This wasn’t supposed to happen.
I’m not stupid.
I’m not stupid.
Am I?
There are no options remaining. There is no hope of recovery. I must flee the country.

Yesterday, something terrifying happened. Something I still don’t fully understand. Am I reaching the edge of my ability?

I haven’t failed before.

What do I do now?

“brick, wall, textura” by bartoszjanusz is marked with CC0 1.0. To view the terms, visit https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/?ref=openverse.
